TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract sealed beforefieldinit TracingBuilderExtensions extends System.Object
public ref class TracingBuilderExtensions abstract sealed

Docs.summary: Extension methods for to add or clear registrations.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder AddListener (this Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder builder, string name, Action<Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ActivityListenerBuilder> configure);

.method public static hidebysig class Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder AddListener(class Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder builder, string name, class System.Action`1<class Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ActivityListenerBuilder> configure) cil managed
<Extension()> Public Function AddListener (builder As ITracingBuilder, name As String, configure As Action(Of ActivityListenerBuilder)) As ITracingBuilder

static member AddListener : Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder * string * Action<Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ActivityListenerBuilder> -> Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder

Docs.param: The .
A name used by configuration-based filtering to identify this listener for rule matching.
A callback that configures the delegate properties of the supplied .
Docs.summary: Registers a new identified by and described by the supplied callback.
Docs.remarks: The tracing infrastructure invokes once when the underlying is first resolved, snapshots the delegate properties from the supplied , and constructs the registered itself. Subscription to instances is driven entirely by the configuration-based set; the builder re-evaluates listener subscriptions automatically when the bound change.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder AddListener (this Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder builder, string name, Action<IServiceProvider,Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ActivityListenerBuilder> configure);

.method public static hidebysig class Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder AddListener(class Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder builder, string name, class System.Action`2<class System.IServiceProvider, class Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ActivityListenerBuilder> configure) cil managed
<Extension()> Public Function AddListener (builder As ITracingBuilder, name As String, configure As Action(Of IServiceProvider, ActivityListenerBuilder)) As ITracingBuilder

static member AddListener : Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder * string * Action<IServiceProvider, Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ActivityListenerBuilder> -> Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder

Docs.param: The .
A name used by configuration-based filtering to identify this listener for rule matching.
A callback that configures the supplied , with access to the resolved .
Docs.summary: Registers a new identified by and described by the supplied callback, which also receives the resolved .
Docs.remarks: The tracing infrastructure invokes once when the underlying is first resolved, snapshots the delegate properties from the supplied , and constructs the registered itself. Subscription to instances is driven entirely by the configuration-based set; the builder re-evaluates listener subscriptions automatically when the bound change.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder ClearListeners (this Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder builder);
.method public static hidebysig class Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder ClearListeners(class Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder builder) cil managed
<Extension()> Public Function ClearListeners (builder As ITracingBuilder) As ITracingBuilder
static member ClearListeners : Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder -> Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder

Docs.param: The .
Docs.summary: Removes all registrations from the dependency injection container.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder DisableTracing (this Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder builder, string? sourceName = default, string? operationName = default, string? listenerName = default, Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ActivitySourceScopes scopes = Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ActivitySourceScopes.Global | Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ActivitySourceScopes.Local);

.method public static hidebysig class Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder DisableTracing(class Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder builder, string sourceName, string operationName, string listenerName, valuetype Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ActivitySourceScopes scopes) cil managed

<Extension()> Public Function DisableTracing (builder As ITracingBuilder, Optional sourceName As String = Nothing, Optional operationName As String = Nothing, Optional listenerName As String = Nothing, Optional scopes As ActivitySourceScopes = Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ActivitySourceScopes.Global | Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ActivitySourceScopes.Local) As ITracingBuilder

static member DisableTracing : Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder * string * string * string * Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ActivitySourceScopes -> Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ITracingBuilder

Docs.param: The .
The , prefix, or pattern with a single * wildcard. A or empty value matches all activity sources.
The , exact match. A null or empty value matches all activities within the matching sources.
The . A null or empty value matches all listeners.
A bitwise combination of the enumeration values that specifies the scopes to consider. Defaults to all scopes.
Docs.summary: Disables all activities for the given source, operation, listener, and scopes.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.TracingOptions DisableTracing (this Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.TracingOptions options, string? sourceName = default, string? operationName = default, string? listenerName = default, Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ActivitySourceScopes scopes = Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ActivitySourceScopes.Global | Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Tracing.ActivitySourceScopes.Local);

Docs.param: The .
The , prefix, or pattern with a single * wildcard. A or empty value matches all activity sources.
The , exact match. A null or empty value matches all activities within the matching sources.
The . A null or empty value matches all listeners.
A bitwise combination of the enumeration values that specifies the scopes to consider. Defaults to all scopes.
Docs.summary: Disables all activities for the given source, operation, listener, and scopes.

The , exact match. A null or empty value matches all activities within the matching sources.
The . A null or empty value matches all listeners.
A bitwise combination of the enumeration values that specifies the scopes to consider. Defaults to all scopes.
